title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 5 - Communicating (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science course taught by David J. Malan. Chapter 5 covers communicating concepts in artificial intelligence. The course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This CS50 chapter, presented live and unedited with Brian Yu, covers communicating concepts within artificial intelligence as part of Harvard University's introduction to computer science. The material situates AI communication alongside broader topics including generative AI and software engineering. The course is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
